title: A Smile Across the Room
content: The community library was full of people reading quietly. Emily was looking for a novel when she noticed James sitting by the window. He looked up from his book and smiled at her. She smiled back before returning to the shelves. A few minutes later, they reached for the same book at the same time. Both laughed, and James suggested they have coffee after visiting the library. Emily agreed without hesitation. Sometimes, one simple smile was enough to begin a beautiful friendship.
